summary: The balcony is in good decorative and structural order, showing light weathering and minor outdoor dust consistent with normal exposure. The composite decking boards, metal balustrade, and glazed access door are all clean, stable, and free of any notable damage.

items.name: Balcony decking
items.description: Grey composite decking boards with a ribbed non-slip profile, laid horizontally.
defects: Light weathering and minor water spots consistent with outdoor exposure

items.name: Balustrade
items.description: Dark brown/bronze powder-coated metal safety railing with vertical slats and a flat handrail.

items.name: Exterior walls
items.description: Off-white textured concrete cladding panels forming the exterior walls of the building.

items.name: Balcony glazed door
items.description: Large floor-to-ceiling double-glazed door with a bronze-anodized aluminum frame, opening inwards.
defects: Light water marks and dust to the exterior glazing face

items.name: Balcony ceiling / Soffit
items.description: Underside of the concrete balcony above, finished in off-white textured rendering.
